title: Fort Mangad
tagline: Fort Mangad — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Mangad Fort is a survey fort which is situated in Borwadi, an area near Mashidwadi in Mangaon, a taluka in Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Mangad Fort is a survey fort which is situated in Borwadi, an area near Mashidwadi in Mangaon, a taluka in Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. The fort is made sacred by the footsteps of the founder of Hindavi Swaraj, the famous Maratha king Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaja. Mangaon is situated about 150 km from Mumbai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Fort Mangad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Fort Mangad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Fort Mangad?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (67 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Fort Mangad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Fort Mangad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Fort Mangad?
faq.a: Stays in Fort Mangad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
